sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check if the charcoal moved after this click. The pink bar went from px=55 to something else, suggesting the progress bar changed. Let me check the charcoal position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if charcoal moved
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) > 40:
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"c: [{min(p[0] for p in b)},{min(p[1] for p in b)}]-[{max(p[0] for p in b)},{max(p[1] for p in b)}]")
    if n['color'] == 'P':
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"P: px={n['pixels']}")

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    bc = None
    ac = None
    for n in last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) > 40:
            bc = (min(p[1] for p in n['boundary']), max(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
    for n in last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) > 40:
            ac = (min(p[1] for p in n['boundary']), max(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
    print(f"Charcoal cols before: {bc}, after: {ac}")
    
    bp = None
    ap = None
    for n in last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'P':
            bp = n['pixels']
    for n in last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'P':
            ap = n['pixels']
    print(f"Pink px before: {bp}, after: {ap}")
</parameter>
